name: Bad Boys VS Crazy Girls
overview: Kate and Liam's relationship is in jeopardy because of their long-distance relationship. Kate is busy with her career as a fashion stylist in Milan, while Liam is struggling to revive his music career. Will their relationship survive despite the obstacles, including the presence of a new person in their lives?
